form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Freshened for 49 days. Last run finished fourth of 12 starters at this track on February 21 over 3900m, slow track; 1.3 len behind Getaway With You with 75.5kg at $3.20. Race before led throughout and just faded finished second of 7 starters at Uttoxeter on January 24 over 4000m, on slow going 1.0 len behind Eton Mes carrying 72.5kg at $5.50. Gets a chance to win. All set to reverse the recent form.

form.formComment: Resuming after a two months break. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at Huntingdon February 5 over 3200m. When resuming last campaign didn't finish the race at Hereford November 25 over 3900m. Don't see that trend changing here.

form.formComment: Racing well. Last start won by 1.0 len this track on March 26 over 3900m defeating Can You Hear Me with 67.5kg at $6 in a hurdle. form.formComment: Comes off a 41 day let-up. Last start pulled up at Ffos Las on March 1 over 3200m. The start before that; finished eighth of 11 runners at Leicester on January 20 over 4100m, on rain affected going; 73 len behind Queen Of Steel with 74kg at $21. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Can do a lot better - winning prospects.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Tougher class here fresh and not expected to threaten this line-up.
